channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 700x600x30mm number 2 unable to mark up size is approx footway criteria applied (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 18th March
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 700x500x40mm number 1 unable to mark up size is approx (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is not working, 18th March
item.description:
In the car park at the end of the road so there is no lighting at all

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, White Hart Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes and edging around small man hole covers aroded, 18th March
item.description:
Large porthole as you come off the roundabout onto Cheltenham Road. Then as you drive along all the tarmac around the small ma hole covers eroded and chipped away making for a bumpy drive. Further along on this same stretch of road, just before the traffic lights there is a large pothole causing car wheel to dip. Dangerous for motorcyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: After road resurfaced there seems to be a water leak, 18th March
item.description:
Outside number 2 Hewlett Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5b, Harp Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
